query: motion blur photograph long exposure subject in motion
message: anti-aesthetic / clarity_and_focus / intentional_blur: motion blur, long exposure subject motion - artistic streaks and dynamic blur

response.objective_caption: Vertical streaks of saturated color including yellow, blue, red, and white merge into one another against a dark background, forming soft elongated shapes that suggest draped fabric or flowing material captured in motion.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: Vertical streaks of saturated but clashing color—yellow, blue, red, and white—smear and bleed into one another through heavy motion blur, dissolving any recognizable subject into an abstract, dreamlike apparition against a dark background; the extreme blur and irrational color juxtapositions create a surreal, subconscious impression where forms refuse to resolve into coherent representation.
